subject: Freight Market Update — April 2026
body:
FREIGHT WEEKLY — Your Weekly Market Update

━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━

Market Snapshot: April 6, 2026

Dry van spot rates continued their seasonal climb this week, with national averages hitting $2.45/mi — up 3.2% from last month. The Southeast corridor remains tight, particularly Atlanta and Charlotte lanes.

Flatbed demand surged in Texas and Oklahoma driven by construction season and energy infrastructure projects. Expect rates on Houston outbound lanes to remain elevated through Q2.

Reefer capacity is loosening slightly in the Midwest as produce season hasn't fully kicked off yet.

Key Indicators:
- DAT National Van Rate: $2.45/mi (+$0.08 w/w)
- DAT National Flatbed Rate: $2.82/mi (+$0.12 w/w)
- DAT National Reefer Rate: $2.91/mi (-$0.03 w/w)
- Diesel National Avg: $3.78/gal (-$0.02 w/w)

To unsubscribe, click here.
